answers.description: Dubai-first travel and tourism website offering packages, tours, trips, and excursions across UAE and 14 global destinations
answers.problem_statement: Travellers need a trusted, locally-rooted Dubai travel company that can handle everything from desert safaris to African safaris and beyond
answers.target_users: UAE residents, tourists visiting Dubai, and international travellers seeking premium guided experiences
answers.voice_tone: Warm, expert, and inspiring — like a trusted local friend who knows every destination
answers.design_principles: Dubai-first, mobile-first, conversion-optimised, content-managed by non-technical team
answers.frontend: WordPress with custom theme (Elementor Pro for page building)
answers.infrastructure: Self-hosted VPS or managed WordPress hosting (Cloudways / Kinsta)
